orangeHackerCat.style: cute hacker cat with cyberpunk jacket, cyan/magenta/amber accents
notes: Generated from the user's orange hacker cat reference as a new clean asset.
Chroma-key source used flat green background, then local alpha cutout was created.
Use as a contained sidebar badge only; do not use as a full workspace wallpaper or button sticker.

sidebarHeroCharacter.style: male helmeted cyber mecha cat warrior with glossy black, red, and gold armor
notes: Original character generated with Image2 from the user's prompt; no third-party character image was copied into this asset.
Selected from the generated character variants after user review.
Chroma-key source used flat green background, then local alpha cutout was created.
Use as an opaque body-level foreground layer to the right of the sidebar, not behind navigation text.

generatedCharacterAlternates.role: approved alternate original cyber cat character family
generatedCharacterAlternates.provenance: Generated with Image2 during the project design workflow.
notes: These are generated alternates, not third-party reference images.
Select variants by composition and runtime size; do not place every variant in the same interface.

buttonGlyphs.role: abstract cat-mecha UI button glyph set
buttonGlyphs.style: transparent SVG icons using cat-adjacent symbols, not repeated cat-face stickers
buttonGlyphs.guardrail: Do not paste the orange cat badge or hero character onto every button. Use only abstract glyphs for buttons.
notes: Transparent by construction because every asset is SVG with no background rectangle.
Uses a shared cyberpunk palette: cyan, green, magenta, gold-orange, and black titanium.
Pet-supply motifs are allowed when they stay abstract and button-readable: collar tag, fishbone, yarn, scoop, bowl, can, and teaser wand.
Button replacement remains opt-in; these assets are packaged first and not automatically applied to the live Codex UI.
